root_cause: Pod cannot start because a snapshot-restored volume cannot be mounted
evidence: Referenced PVC is bound and sourced from a VolumeSnapshot
Pod later reports attach or mount failures for that restored volume
Specific mount causes like permission-denied or multi-attach are excluded

causes.message: PVC was restored successfully from a VolumeSnapshot
Pod failed to attach or mount the restored volume
Pod remains Pending because the restored volume cannot be used

pod:restored-pg-0: Pod cannot start because a snapshot-restored volume cannot be mounted
pvc:restored-pg-data: PVC restored from snapshot but later attach or mount failed

likely_causes: Node-specific storage access problem after restore completed
CSI attacher or kubelet cannot finish the post-restore mount sequence
Restored volume exists but is not becoming usable on the target node
suggested_checks: Check CSI node and controller logs
